seriess.title: Large Bank Consumer Mortgage Originations: Average Interest Rate at Origination by Credit Score: 30-Year Fixed Rate Mortgage: >=740 Credit Score
seriess.notes:
The average interest rate at origination for 30-year fixed rate mortgages with a borrower with a credit score greater than or equal to 740 at the time of origination.

For more detail see the methodology (https://sc103-philfed-prod-cm.sitecore-prod-ase4.appserviceenvironment.net/surveys-and-data/y14-methodology).
